001package guiAdminHome;
002
003import java.util.List;
004import java.util.Optional;
005
006import database.Database;
007import entityClasses.User;
008import javafx.scene.control.Alert;
009import javafx.scene.control.Alert.AlertType;
010import javafx.scene.control.ButtonType;
011import javafx.scene.control.TextArea;
012import javafx.scene.control.TextInputDialog;
013
014/*******
015 * <p> Title: GUIAdminHomePage Class. </p>
016 * 
017 * <p> Description: The Java/FX-based Admin Home Page.  This class provides the controller actions
018 * basic on the user's use of the JavaFX GUI widgets defined by the View class.
019 * 
020 * This page contains a number of buttons that have not yet been implemented.  WHen those buttons
021 * are pressed, an alert pops up to tell the user that the function associated with the button has
022 * not been implemented. Also, be aware that What has been implemented may not work the way the
023 * final product requires and there maybe defects in this code.
024 * 
025 * The class has been written assuming that the View or the Model are the only class methods that
026 * can invoke these methods.  This is why each has been declared at "protected".  Do not change any
027 * of these methods to public.</p>
028 * 
029 * <p> Copyright: Lynn Robert Carter © 2025 </p>
030 * 
031 * @author Lynn Robert Carter
032 * 
033 * @version 1.00                2025-08-17 Initial version
034 * @version 1.01                2025-09-16 Update Javadoc documentation *  
035 */
036
037public class ControllerAdminHome {
038        
039        /*-*******************************************************************************************
040
041        User Interface Actions for this page
042        
043        This controller is not a class that gets instantiated.  Rather, it is a collection of protected
044        static methods that can be called by the View (which is a singleton instantiated object) and 
045        the Model is often just a stub, or will be a singleton instantiated object.
046        
047        */
048        
049        /**
050         * Default constructor is not used.
051         */
052        public ControllerAdminHome() {
053        }
054        
055        // Reference for the in-memory database so this package has access
056        private static Database theDatabase = applicationMain.FoundationsMain.database;
057
058        /**********
059         * <p> 
060         * 
061         * Title: setOnetimePassword () Method. </p>
062         * 
063         * <p> Description: Protected method that allows an admin to set a one-time password
064         * for a user. The admin can enter a password or allow the system to generate one. </p>
065         */
066        protected static void setOnetimePassword () {
067                TextInputDialog userDialog = new TextInputDialog("");
068                userDialog.setTitle("Set One-Time Password");
069                userDialog.setHeaderText("Enter the username to reset");
070                Optional<String> userResult = userDialog.showAndWait();
071                if (userResult.isEmpty()) return;
072                String username = userResult.get().trim();
073                if (username.length() < 1) return;
074
075                if (!theDatabase.getUserAccountDetails(username)) {
076                        Alert alert = new Alert(AlertType.WARNING);
077                        alert.setTitle("User Not Found");
078                        alert.setHeaderText("No user found with that username");
079                        alert.setContentText("Please verify the username and try again.");
080                        alert.showAndWait();
081                        return;
082                }
083
084                TextInputDialog passDialog = new TextInputDialog("");
085                passDialog.setTitle("Set One-Time Password");
086                passDialog.setHeaderText("Enter a one-time password (leave blank to auto-generate)");
087                Optional<String> passResult = passDialog.showAndWait();
088                if (passResult.isEmpty()) return;
089                String newPassword = passResult.get().trim();
090                if (newPassword.length() < 1) newPassword = generateOneTimePassword();
091
092                if (theDatabase.updatePassword(username, newPassword)) {
093                        if (ViewAdminHome.theUser != null && username.equals(ViewAdminHome.theUser.getUserName())) {
094                                ViewAdminHome.theUser.setPassword(newPassword);
095                        }
096                        Alert alert = new Alert(AlertType.INFORMATION);
097                        alert.setTitle("One-Time Password Set");
098                        alert.setHeaderText("Password reset completed");
099                        alert.setContentText("Temporary password for " + username + ": " + newPassword +
100                                        "\nAsk the user to change it after login.");
101                        alert.showAndWait();
102                } else {
103                        Alert alert = new Alert(AlertType.ERROR);
104                        alert.setTitle("Password Update Failed");
105                        alert.setHeaderText("Unable to update the password");
106                        alert.setContentText("Please try again or verify the database connection.");
107                        alert.showAndWait();
108                }
109        }
110        
111        /**********
112         * <p> 
113         * 
114         * Title: deleteUser () Method. </p>
115         * 
116         * <p> Description: Protected method that allows an admin to delete a user account. </p>
117         */
118        protected static void deleteUser() {
119                TextInputDialog userDialog = new TextInputDialog("");
120                userDialog.setTitle("Delete User");
121                userDialog.setHeaderText("Enter the username to delete");
122                Optional<String> userResult = userDialog.showAndWait();
123                if (userResult.isEmpty()) return;
124                String username = userResult.get().trim();
125                if (username.length() < 1) return;
126
127                if (ViewAdminHome.theUser != null && username.equals(ViewAdminHome.theUser.getUserName())) {
128                        Alert alert = new Alert(AlertType.WARNING);
129                        alert.setTitle("Delete User");
130                        alert.setHeaderText("Cannot delete the active user");
131                        alert.setContentText("Log out and use another admin account to delete this user.");
132                        alert.showAndWait();
133                        return;
134                }
135
136                Alert confirm = new Alert(AlertType.CONFIRMATION);
137                confirm.setTitle("Confirm Delete");
138                confirm.setHeaderText("Delete user: " + username + "?");
139                confirm.setContentText("This action cannot be undone.");
140                Optional<ButtonType> choice = confirm.showAndWait();
141                if (choice.isEmpty() || choice.get() != ButtonType.OK) return;
142
143                if (theDatabase.deleteUser(username)) {
144                        Alert alert = new Alert(AlertType.INFORMATION);
145                        alert.setTitle("Delete User");
146                        alert.setHeaderText("User deleted");
147                        alert.setContentText("The user account was removed successfully.");
148                        alert.showAndWait();
149                        ViewAdminHome.label_NumberOfUsers.setText("Number of users: " +
150                                        theDatabase.getNumberOfUsers());
151                } else {
152                        Alert alert = new Alert(AlertType.ERROR);
153                        alert.setTitle("Delete User");
154                        alert.setHeaderText("Delete failed");
155                        alert.setContentText("No matching user found or database error occurred.");
156                        alert.showAndWait();
157                }
158        }
159        
160        /**********
161         * <p> 
162         * 
163         * Title: listUsers () Method. </p>
164         * 
165         * <p> Description: Protected method that shows a list of all users. </p>
166         */
167        protected static void listUsers() {
168                List<User> users = theDatabase.getAllUsers();
169                StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
170                if (users.isEmpty()) {
171                        sb.append("No users found in the system.");
172                } else {
173                        for (User user : users) {
174                                sb.append("Username: ").append(user.getUserName());
175                                sb.append("  [Roles: ");
176                                sb.append(formatRoles(user));
177                                sb.append("]");
178                                
179                                // Show name details
180                                String firstName = user.getFirstName();
181                                String middleName = user.getMiddleName();
182                                String lastName = user.getLastName();
183                                String preferredName = user.getPreferredFirstName();
184                                
185                                if ((firstName != null && !firstName.isEmpty()) || 
186                                    (middleName != null && !middleName.isEmpty()) || 
187                                    (lastName != null && !lastName.isEmpty())) {
188                                        sb.append("\n  Name: ");
189                                        if (firstName != null && !firstName.isEmpty()) sb.append(firstName);
190                                        if (middleName != null && !middleName.isEmpty()) sb.append(" ").append(middleName);
191                                        if (lastName != null && !lastName.isEmpty()) sb.append(" ").append(lastName);
192                                        if (preferredName != null && !preferredName.isEmpty()) {
193                                                sb.append(" (Preferred: ").append(preferredName).append(")");
194                                        }
195                                }
196                                
197                                String email = user.getEmailAddress();
198                                if (email != null && email.length() > 0) {
199                                        sb.append("\n  Email: ").append(email);
200                                }
201                                String phone = user.getPhoneNumber();
202                                if (phone != null && phone.length() > 0) {
203                                        sb.append("\n  Phone: ").append(phone);
204                                }
205                                sb.append("\n\n");
206                        }
207                }
208
209                TextArea textArea = new TextArea(sb.toString());
210                textArea.setEditable(false);
211                textArea.setWrapText(true);
212                textArea.setPrefWidth(600);
213                textArea.setPrefHeight(300);
214
215                Alert alert = new Alert(AlertType.INFORMATION);
216                alert.setTitle("User List");
217                alert.setHeaderText("All users in the system");
218                alert.getDialogPane().setContent(textArea);
219                alert.showAndWait();
220        }
221
222        /**********
223         * Helper to format user roles for display.
224         */
225        private static String formatRoles(User user) {
226                StringBuilder roles = new StringBuilder();
227                if (user.getAdminRole()) roles.append("Admin, ");
228                if (user.getStudentRole()) roles.append("Student, ");
229                if (user.getStaffRole()) roles.append("Staff, ");
230                if (roles.length() == 0) return "None";
231                return roles.substring(0, roles.length() - 2);
232        }
233
234        /**********
235         * Helper to generate a one-time password.
236         */
237        private static String generateOneTimePassword() {
238                String uuid = java.util.UUID.randomUUID().toString().replace("-", "");
239                return uuid.substring(0, 10);
240        }
241        
242        /**********
243         * <p> 
244         * 
245         * Title: addRemoveRoles () Method. </p>
246         * 
247         * <p> Description: Protected method that allows an admin to add and remove roles for any of
248         * the users currently in the system.  This is done by invoking the AddRemoveRoles Page. There
249         * is no need to specify the home page for the return as this can only be initiated by and
250         * Admin.</p>
251         */
252        protected static void addRemoveRoles() {
253                guiAddRemoveRoles.ViewAddRemoveRoles.displayAddRemoveRoles(ViewAdminHome.theStage, 
254                                ViewAdminHome.theUser);
255        }
256        
257        /**********
258         * <p> 
259         * 
260         * Title: performLogout () Method. </p>
261         * 
262         * <p> Description: Protected method that logs this user out of the system and returns to the
263         * login page for future use.</p>
264         */
265        protected static void performLogout() {
266                guiUserLogin.ViewUserLogin.displayUserLogin(ViewAdminHome.theStage);
267        }
268        
269        /**********
270         * <p> 
271         * 
272         * Title: performBackToLogin () Method. </p>
273         * 
274         * <p> Description: Protected method that returns to the user login page without logging out.
275         * This allows another user to login while keeping the current session available.</p>
276         */
277        protected static void performBackToLogin() {
278                guiUserLogin.ViewUserLogin.displayUserLogin(ViewAdminHome.theStage);
279        }
280        
281        /**********
282         * <p> 
283         * 
284         * Title: inviteUsers () Method. </p>
285         * 
286         * <p> Description: Protected method that displays the Invite Users page where admins can
287         * generate invitation codes for new users.</p>
288         */
289        protected static void inviteUsers() {
290                guiInviteUsers.ViewInviteUsers.displayInviteUsers(ViewAdminHome.theStage, ViewAdminHome.theUser);
291        }
292
293        protected static void openDiscussionBoard() {
294                guiDiscussion.ViewDiscussionBoard.displayDiscussionBoard(ViewAdminHome.theStage,
295                                ViewAdminHome.theUser, 1);
296        }
297
298        protected static void openTeacherGradebook() {
299                guiGradebook.ViewGradebook.displayGradebook(ViewAdminHome.theStage, ViewAdminHome.theUser);
300        }
301        
302        /**********
303         * <p> 
304         * 
305         * Title: performQuit () Method. </p>
306         * 
307         * <p> Description: Protected method that gracefully terminates the execution of the program.
308         * </p>
309         */
310        protected static void performQuit() {
311                System.exit(0);
312        }
313}
